docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF BAY PARTNERS, LLC, TRUSTEE OF THE PYRAMID TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 6, 2014 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROY, ABHISHEK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 CLAY STREET, #307, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111 [COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO], LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78688796)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, ABHISHEK
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 78573532) AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, ABHISHEK
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 78646222) AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, ABHISHEK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78519217), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF BAY PARTNERS, LLC, TRUSTEE OF THE PYRAMID TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 6, 2014 SERVED FEB-10-2026, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 78646222) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF BAY PARTNERS, LLC, TRUSTEE OF THE PYRAMID TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 6, 2014

DECLARATION OF ELECTRONIC LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 78682607) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF BAY PARTNERS, LLC, TRUSTEE OF THE PYRAMID TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 6, 2014

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF BAY PARTNERS, LLC, TRUSTEE OF THE PYRAMID TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 6, 2014 AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, ABHISHEK DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
